_doc: Wave-4 model comparison: Qwen3.6-27B-UD-Q8_K_XL (llama.cpp GGUF, GPU1) as the context generator, 12k window, header+LLM all chunks. SPOT-CHECK only (small repos) — llama.cpp GGUF Q8 throughput (~0.3-0.8 chunk/s, ~5s/req fixed overhead) makes full-corpus contextualization impractical vs vLLM NVFP4. Score with --repos limited to covered repos.
